body.title: Diagnose: Igor replies don't reach web UI
body.result: Traced round-trip: UU routing correct (16:17:41 fanout=1 confirms it). Failures at 16:19/16:20 had no POST — Igor gates degenerate cognition output upstream of send(). Added web_send: INFO log (AR-009) + 7 round-trip routing tests.
body.description:
Igor receives messages sent from the web UI (confirmed: he replied to 'hello?' on 2026-06-01) but his replies don't appear in the web UI. The web→Igor path uses HTTP polling (devices/igor/web/adc_client.py poll_messages() → /api/agents/igor/poll). The Igor→web reply path is unconfirmed — trace where Igor posts replies and whether those reach the web server's WebSocket hub.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/web/adc_client.py (send_reply or equivalent), devices/web_server/server.py (/api/agents/{id}/poll response path), devices/igor/web/server.py (background poll loop)
**Design rules:** log every interface crossing (reply send + receive)
**Scope boundary:** IN: trace Igor's outbound reply path; fix the gap so replies appear in web UI chat pane. OUT: three-pane UI redesign (separate ticket).
**Completion criteria:** Sending 'hello' from the web UI to Igor's tab and getting a response that appears in the same chat pane within 30s. Add a test or log line confirming the round-trip path.
